basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech with First class in ECE/EEE/Instrumentation and Control Engineering from UGC recognized University with valid GATE score
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech with First class in ECE/EEE/Instrumentation and Control Engineering from UGC recognized University with valid GATE score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Trichy Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Trichy Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Trichy?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Trichy is 23rd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech degree with First Class in ECE/EEE/Instrumentation and Control Engineering from a UGC recognized University, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (5 years) and OBC (3 years) candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITT/ANRF/PMECRG/2026/MRR.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the position of Junior Research Fellow.
